title: More Lost Cartoon Network Classics Are Returning With New Release This Spring
content: It looks like more lost Cartoon Network classics are set to make their returns to streaming with a cool new release later this Spring according to a new listing spotted. It’s been a whirlwind of a time to be a Cartoon Network fan.
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump’s New Anime Is Practically Perfect (But Western Fans Won’t See Why)
content: New anime stemming from the Shonen genre in the Shonen Jump magazine always gets special attention from the anime community. Fans have come to understand the formula of shonen series, and despite its repetitive patterns across many anime, it remains one of the most refined and popular genres.
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Super Confirms Release Date for Next Anime Update
content: Dragon Ball Super is set to make its highly anticipated return to screens later this year with a new anime, and the franchise has confirmed when fans will be getting the next major update on how it’s all coming along so far .
author: ComicBook

title: Azur Lane: Slow Ahead! Season 2 Anime's 2nd Promo Video Reveals Another Theme Song, July 5 Premiere
content: The official website for Azur Lane: Slow Ahead! 2! ( Azur Lane Bisoku Zenshin! 2! ), the second television anime season of shorts adapting Hori's Azur Lane Bisoku Zenshin! four-panel manga , began streaming the second main promotional video on Monday.
author: ANN

title: Yo-yo Brand en's Original Anime Hibi Yōyō to. Reveals Animated Music Video for Opening Theme
content: Kadokawa revealed the animated music video for the opening theme song of yo-yo brand en's original anime project Hibi Yōyō to. (Days with Exultation.) on Monday. Japanese music group cadode performs the anime's opening song "Hikari no Kasa" (Halo of Light).
author: ANN

title: K Manga Adds Watch Out for Watarase Manga
content: Kodansha 's K MANGA platform announced on Sunday it is publishing Paris Nakagawa 's Watch Out for Watarase ( Tokoton Kuzu na Watarase nanoni ) manga in English as a simulpub title. The first 14 chapters are available to read at time of writing.
author: ANN

title: You Midorikawa's Tensei-saki wa Kita no Henkyō Deshita ga Manga Ends
content: Manga author You Midorikawa revealed that their Tensei-saki wa Kita no Henkyō Deshita ga Seirei no Okage de Kekkō Kaiteki Desu: Rakuen Mezashite Shuryō Kaitaku Tokidoki Sauna (I Was Reincarnated in the Northern Frontier, But Thanks to the Spirits, It's Quite Comfortable: Hunting, Cultivating, and Occasional Saunas…
author: ANN

title: OceanVeil Streams Ingoku Danchi: Deviant's Apartment Complex Anime
content: WWWave Corporation 's new anime streaming platform OceanVeil announced on Monday that it is streaming Ingoku Danchi: Deviant's Apartment Complex , the short television anime of writer Sakusei Kenkyūjo and artist Yui Jōyama 's Ingoku Danchi (Indecent Apartment Complex) manga.
author: ANN

title: Detective Conan: Fallen Angel of the Highway Anime Film Sets New 3-Day Opening Record for Franchise
content: Comparatively, the franchise 's 28th film , Meitantei Conan: Sekigan no Flashback ( Detective Conan: One-eyed Flashback ), earned 3,438,626,700 yen (about US$24.15 million at the time) and sold 2,314,690 tickets in its first three days, and made a new opening-weekend record for the franchise last year.
author: ANN

title: Abyss Rage's Nariaki Narita Launches New Manga
content: Shueisha 's Shonen Jump+ website launched Nariaki Narita 's new manga titled Subaru the Invincible ( Muteki no Subaru) on Sunday. Shueisha 's MANGA Plus service simultaneously releases the manga in English and describes the story: Practical Karate is known as Full Contact Karate, where strikes and kicks determine the…
author: ANN
